titles.title: I Was There When It Happened

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There are some people who say we cannot tell Whether we are saved or whether all is well They say we only can hope and trust that it is so Well, I was there when it happened and I guess I ought to know

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh I was there when He saved me, (when He saved my soul) The very moment He forgave me, (cleansed and made me whole) He took away my heavy burdens (yes he took my sins) And He gave me peace within, (gave me peace within)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Satan tries to make me doubt it, (he can't make me doubt it) Oh and I'm gonna shout it, (yes I'm gonna shout it) I was there when it happened (oh my Lord I guess I ought to know) And so I guess I ought to know

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I don't care who tells me salvation is not real Though the world may argue, that you cannot feel The heavy burden's lifted and the vile sins go But I was there when it happened and I guess I ought to know

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh I was there when He saved me, (when He saved my soul) The very moment He forgave me, (cleansed and made me whole) He took away my heavy burdens (yes he took my sins) And He gave me peace within, (gave me peace within)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Satan tries to make me doubt it, (he can't make me doubt it) Oh and I'm gonna shout it, (yes I'm gonna shout it) I was there when it happened (oh my Lord I guess I ought to know) And so I guess I ought to know

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I don't care who tells me salvation is not real Though the world may argue, that you cannot feel And even though old Satan, he tries to tell me no But I was there when it happened and I guess I ought to know

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Oh I was there when He saved me, (when He saved my soul) The very moment He forgave me, (cleansed and made me whole) He took away my heavy burdens (yes he took my sins) And He gave me peace within, (gave me peace within)

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Satan tries to make me doubt it, (he can't make me doubt it) Oh and I'm gonna shout it, (yes I'm gonna shout it) I was there when it happened (oh my Lord I guess I ought to know) And so I guess I ought to know
